recommendations.title: Ben 10: Alien Swarm
recommendations.overview: Ben and a mysterious girl from his past must prevent an alien threat from destroying the world.

recommendations.title: Freaked
recommendations.overview: A vain actor, his best friend, and an activist end up at a mutant freak farm run by a weirdo scientist.

recommendations.title: Ben 10: Race Against Time
recommendations.genres: Action, Family, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Ben, Gwen, and Max must stop an extraterrestrial who plans to open a gateway that leads to an alien invasion.

recommendations.title: Smosh: The Movie
recommendations.overview: An embarrassing video of Anthony surfaces online right before his fifth high school reunion. The Smosh dudes then race to pull down the clip before it blows Anthony's chances of reconnecting with his teen crush Anna.

recommendations.overview: Chiara Ferragni, the first fashion influencer in the world, reveals how the digital revolution has changes business world, communication, fashion, culture, through a portrait in which she's the protagonist, both as a woman and as digital entrepreneur

recommendations.title: The Social Dilemma
recommendations.overview: This documentary-drama hybrid explores the dangerous human impact of social networking, with tech experts sounding the alarm on their own creations.

recommendations.title: Kong: Skull Island
recommendations.overview: Explore the mysterious and dangerous home of the king of the apes as a team of explorers ventures deep inside the treacherous, primordial island.

recommendations.title: Tron

recommendations.title: The Remarkable Life of Ibelin
recommendations.overview: The secret life of a young World of Warcraft gamer is vividly reimagined when his online friends contact his family after his death.
